12083254_ut_austin:
Hi Alex,

Thanks so much for your time, it was great chatting with you.

Here’s how credit works for the UT Austin Global Career Accelerator:
  • The program is designed to fulfill 3 total credits. You can earn elective credit.
  • The course code(s) for the type of credit you receive:
    • If you have questions about how these credits will fit into your degree plan, your academic advisor is your best point of contact.

    As a reminder:
    • In addition to receiving credit, you’ll add real-world experience to your résumé and build a portfolio to showcase to future employers.

    We’ll let you know as soon as enrollment opens and you can register for the program. Excited to have you potentially joining us this term!

    As always, let me know if you have any questions. I’m here to help.

    Best,

    Jordan Rivera
    The University of Texas at Austin
    Program Advisor | UT Austin Global Career Accelerator
    advisor@go.global.utexas.edu | (737) 260-0897
    https://www.go.global.utexas.edu

12083261_ut_austin:
Hi Alex,

It was great chatting with you. I’m following up with some additional information on program cost for the UT Austin Global Career Accelerator.

  • Program Cost: Tuition for this program is covered by your regular university tuition and fees.You can confirm your personal cost here: tuition link.
  • Financial Aid: Students may be able to apply their financial aid to the UT Austin Global Career Accelerator — you can always speak to the Financial Aid Office to discuss your individual financial aid package.
  • Scholarships: You may also be able to apply scholarship money towards our program. Please reach out to your scholarship provider to learn more.

We’ll let you know as soon as enrollment opens and you can register for the program. Excited to have you potentially joining us this term!

Are there any other questions I can help answer? As always, I’m here to support and excited for you to join us.

Best,

Jordan Rivera
The University of Texas at Austin
Program Advisor | UT Austin Global Career Accelerator
advisor@go.global.utexas.edu | (737) 260-0897
https://www.go.global.utexas.edu

22282617_ut_austin:
Hi Alex,

It was great chatting with you. It sounds like the UT Austin Global Career Accelerator may really benefit you!

What you get:

Students who complete the program add experience to their resume, increase job qualifications, receive certifications, and credits. Two out of three alumni say this was one of the most valuable things they did during college.

Program Overview:

The UT Austin Global Career Accelerator is a for-credit career accelerator providing real-world experience for your résumé.

  • Digital Marketing
  • FAQs
  • Testimonials

We’ll let you know as soon as enrollment opens!

Questions? Call/text (737) 260-0897.

-

Jordan Rivera
The University of Texas at Austin
Program Advisor | UT Austin Global Career Accelerator
advisor@go.global.utexas.edu | (737) 260-0897
https://www.go.global.utexas.edu

21777453_ut_austin:
Hi Alex,

I just attempted connecting with you regarding your current registration hold that is preventing you from being registered in the UT Austin Global Career Accelerator this upcoming term.

As a reminder, you must resolve this hold by Monday, June 15, 2026. If you do not resolve your hold by this time, you will be withdrawn from the program.

Once you’ve taken care of the registration error, please let me know so I can confirm that everything is set and you’re properly registered.

Warmly,

Andrew Suneson
The University of Texas at Austin
Program Advisor | UT Austin Global Career Accelerator
